title: flaky roasted turkish lamb roast
description: a moist and flavorful lamb roast infused with the aromas of the mediterranean region, perfect for special occasions.
instructions: rub the lamb leg with olive oil, then season with cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
heat some oil in a large oven-safe pan over medium-high heat. sear the lamb leg until browned on all sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
transfer the lamb to a roasting pan, then add the potatoes and carrots to the pan with the lamb. roast in the oven for 20 minutes, or until the lamb has browned lightly.

reduce the oven temperature to 180°c (350°f). continue to roast the lamb for another 1 1/2 to 2 hours, or until it reaches the desired level of doneness. baste the lamb and vegetables with the juices every 20-30 minutes.
remove the lamb from the oven, and let it rest for 10-15 minutes before slicing.

meanwhile, toss the potatoes and carrots with olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, and herbs in a bowl. season with salt and black pepper to taste. serve the roasted lamb with the potatoes and carrots, garnished with additional herbs if desired
